case_title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. VS. LU XIE

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT XIE, LU SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-01-2020

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT XIE, LU $7,415.27 PRINCIPAL, $290.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,705.27, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100126638)

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200009100), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. SERVED MAR-13-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE MAR-16-2020 AS TO DEFENDANT XIE, LU
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-27-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $290.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100126638) AS TO DEFENDANT XIE, LU
DECLARATION REGARDING INTEREST COSTS AND ATTORNEY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 100126638) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT XIE, LU
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS (TRANSACTION ID # 100126638) FILED BY ATTORNEY HUNT, MICHAEL SCOTT
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT XIE, LU
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-27-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
